---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
library(tidycensus)
library(tidyverse)
readRenviron("~/.Renviron")
library(tmap)
library(tigris)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(gstat)
library(nlme)
library(spatialreg)
library(ggplot2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(GWmodel)
tmap_mode("view")
library(quantreg)
library(gamboostLSS)
library(caret)
library(e1071)
library(car)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
```

<https://catalog.data.gov/dataset/places-place-data-gis-friendly-format-2020-release-4a44e>

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
data1 <- read_csv("~/Downloads/PLACES__Local_Data_for_Better_Health__County_Data_2024_release.csv")
data2 <- data1 %>% select(
  Year,
  GEOID = Geolocation,
  state = StateAbbr,
  county = LocationName,
  countyID = LocationID,
  STROKE = Data_Value,
  Data_Value_Type,
  MeasureId,
) %>% filter(MeasureId == "STROKE",
             Data_Value_Type == "Crude prevalence",
             Year == 2022,
             !is.na(county)
             ) %>% distinct() %>% select(- Year, - MeasureId)
```

```{r}
# unique(data1$MeasureId)
```

```{r}
data3 <- data1 %>% filter(MeasureId == "CSMOKING",
             Data_Value_Type == "Crude prevalence",
             Year == 2022,
             !is.na(LocationID)
             ) %>% 
  distinct() %>% select(
  countyID = LocationID,
  SMOKE = Data_Value
)
```

<https://www.countyhealthrankings.org/health-data/methodology-and-sources/data-documentation/national-data-documentation-2010-2023>

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
data10 <- read_csv("~/Downloads/analytic_data2022.csv")
data11 <- data10 %>% select(
  countyID = `5-digit FIPS Code`,
  obesity_prev = `Adult obesity raw value`,
  physical_inactive = `Physical inactivity raw value`,
  air_pollution = `Air pollution - particulate matter raw value`,
  diabetes_prev = `Diabetes prevalence raw value`,
) %>% distinct()
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
bound_data <- counties(cb = TRUE, year = 2022, class = "sf") %>%
  select(countyID = GEOID, geometry)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
data <- bound_data %>%
  left_join(data2, by = "countyID") %>%
  left_join(data3, by = "countyID") %>%
  left_join(data11, by = "countyID")
```

```{r}
data20 <- data %>%
  filter(!substr(countyID, 1, 2) %in% c("02", "15"))

data21 <- data %>%
  filter(!substr(countyID, 1, 2) %in% c(
    "02", "15",  # AK, HI
    "60", "66", "69", "72", "78"  # territories
  ))

ggplot(data21) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = STROKE), color = NA) +
  # coord_sf(
  #   xlim = c(-130, -65),
  #   ylim = c(24, 50),
  #   expand = FALSE
  # ) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(na.value = "grey90") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
all(st_is_valid(data21))
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
# neighbor contiguity by poly2nb HW2
nb_queen <- poly2nb(data21)
nb_rook <- poly2nb(data21, queen = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# data21[card(nb_queen) == 0, c("countyID", "county", "state")]
```

```{r}
# Checking I to see if the autocorrelation is + -
# listW <- nb2listw(nb_queen, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
# global_I <- moran(data21$STROKE, listW, n = length(data21$STROKE), S0 = sum(listw2mat(listW)))$I
# cat("Moran's I:", global_I)
# 
# moran.test(data21$STROKE, listW)
# moran.mc(data21$STROKE, listW, nsim = 999, alternative = "greater")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
# local_I <- localmoran(data21$STROKE, listW, zero.policy = TRUE, alternative = "greater")
# data21$Local_I <- local_I[, "Ii"]
# data21$Local_I_p <- local_I[, "Pr(z > E(Ii))"]
```

```{r}
# moran.plot(data21$STROKE, listW, xlab = "STROKE", 
#            ylab = "Spatially lagged Z",
#            main = "Moran plot — US Stroke % by County")
```

```{r}
# # Identify the significant autocorrletion locations
# data21 <- data21 %>%
#   mutate(LISA_sig = case_when(
#     Local_I_p <= 0.01 ~ "p <= 0.01",
#     Local_I_p <= 0.05 ~ "p <= 0.05",
#     TRUE ~ "Not significant"
#     )
#   )
# 
# # Create the cluster sections
# z <- scale(data21$STROKE, center = TRUE, scale = TRUE)[,1]
# lag_z <- lag.listw(listW, z)
# 
# data21 <- data21 %>%
#   mutate(LISA_type = case_when(
#     z > 0 & lag_z > 0 ~ "High-High",
#     z < 0 & lag_z < 0 ~ "Low-Low",
#     z > 0 & lag_z < 0 ~ "High-Low",
#     z < 0 & lag_z > 0 ~ "Low-High"
#     )
#   )
# data21$LISA_type = ifelse(data21$Local_I_p <= 0.05, data21$LISA_type, "Not significant")
# 
# # Check for error typing
# # length(data$Local_I_p[data$Local_I_p<=0.05])
# # 159 - length(data$LISA_type[data$LISA_type == "Not significant"])
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
# LISA_map <- tm_shape(data21) +
#   tm_polygons("Local_I",
#               palette = "-BrBG", title = "Local Moran’s I",
#               border.col = "gray50"
#               ) +
#   tm_layout(title = "Local Moran’s I for US STROKE %",
#             title.position = c("center", "top"),
#             legend.outside = TRUE, frame = FALSE, bg.color = "white"
#             )
# 
# LISA_significance_map = tm_shape(data21) +
#   tm_polygons("LISA_sig",
#               palette = c("p <= 0.01" = "red", 
#                           "p <= 0.05" = "yellow", 
#                           "Not significant" = "white"),
#               title = "LISA Significance", border.col = "black"
#   ) +
#   tm_layout(title = "LISA Significance clusters",
#             title.position = c("center", "top"),
#             legend.outside = TRUE, frame = FALSE, bg.color = "white"
#   )
# 
# LISA_classified_map <- tm_shape(data21) +
#   tm_polygons("LISA_type",
#               palette = c("High-High"="#E41A1C", "Low-Low"="#377EB8",
#               "High-Low"="#4DAF4A", "Low-High"="#984EA3",
#               "Not significant"="white"),
#               title = "LISA cluster type",
#               border.col = "gray40"
#   ) +
#   tm_layout(title = "LISA cluster map (PctBach)",
#             legend.outside = TRUE,
#             frame = FALSE,
#             title.position = c("center", "top")
#   )
# 
# tmap_arrange(LISA_map, LISA_significance_map, LISA_classified_map)
```

```{r}
data22 <- data %>%
  filter(!substr(countyID, 1, 2) %in% c(
    "02", "15",  # AK, HI
    "60", "66", "69", "72", "78"  # territories
  ))

data22 <- data22 %>% select(-Data_Value_Type)
names(data22)
```

```{r}
data22 <- data22 %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(obesity_prev, physical_inactive, air_pollution, diabetes_prev),
    as.numeric
  )) %>%
  mutate(across(
    c(obesity_prev, physical_inactive, diabetes_prev),
    ~ . * 100
  ))

data231 <- data22 %>% select(STROKE, SMOKE, obesity_prev, physical_inactive,
                             air_pollution, diabetes_prev) %>% st_drop_geometry()

cor_matrix <- cor(data231, use = "complete.obs")
round(cor_matrix, 2)
```

```{r}
library(corrplot)

corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper",
         tl.cex = 0.8, number.cex = 0.7, addCoef.col = "black")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
pairs(data231 %>% 
        dplyr::select(STROKE, SMOKE, obesity_prev, physical_inactive, air_pollution, diabetes_prev))
```

```{r}
# data22 <- data22[complete.cases(st_drop_geometry(data22)[, vars]), ]
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
m1 <- lm(SMOKE ~ STROKE + 
           # physical_inactive + 
           obesity_prev + diabetes_prev + air_pollution,
         data = data22)
vif(m1)
qqnorm(m1$residuals)
qqline(m1$residuals)
nb_queen <- poly2nb(data22)
listW <- nb2listw(nb_queen, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
moran.mc(residuals(m1), listw = listW, nsim = 999, alternative = "greater")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
fit_multi <- rq(
  SMOKE ~ STROKE + 
           # physical_inactive + 
           obesity_prev + diabetes_prev + air_pollution,
         data = data22,
  tau = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75),
)

summary(fit_multi, se = "boot")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
plot(summary(fit_multi))
```

```{r}
nrow(data22)
length(unique(data22$countyID))
anyDuplicated(data22$countyID)

colSums(is.na(st_drop_geometry(data22)[, c(
  "STROKE", "SMOKE", "physical_inactive", "air_pollution", "diabetes_prev", "countyID"
)]))
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
vars <- c("countyID", "STROKE", "SMOKE", "physical_inactive", "air_pollution", "diabetes_prev")

# 1) keep sf object for building neighbors
data22_sf <- data22[, c(vars, "geometry")]

# 2) plain data frame for modeling
data22_df <- as.data.frame(st_drop_geometry(data22_sf))

# 3) complete cases on plain data frame only
cc <- complete.cases(data22_df)
data22_sf_cc <- data22_sf[cc, ]
data22_df_cc <- data22_df[cc, ]

# 4) build neighbor structure from polygons
nb <- poly2nb(data22_sf_cc)
A <- nb2mat(nb, style = "B", zero.policy = TRUE)

K <- -A
diag(K) <- rowSums(A)

rid <- as.character(data22_df_cc$countyID)
rownames(K) <- rid
colnames(K) <- rid

# safer as factor
data22_df_cc$countyID <- factor(rid, levels = rid)

ctrl <- boost_control(mstop = 300, nu = 0.05, trace = TRUE)

fit_gb <- gamboost(
  SMOKE ~ bols(STROKE) +
    bbs(physical_inactive) +
    bbs(air_pollution) +
    bbs(diabetes_prev) +
    bmrf(countyID, bnd = K),
  data = data22_df_cc,
  family = QuantReg(tau = 0.5),
  control = ctrl
)
```

```{r}
fit_gb_resid <- fit_gb$resid
qqnorm(fit_multi$residuals)
qqline(fit_multi$residuals)
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(mboost)

vars <- c("GEOID", "STROKE", "SMOKE", "physical_inactive", "air_pollution", "diabetes_prev")

data22_sf <- data22[, c(vars, "geometry")]
data22_df <- as.data.frame(st_drop_geometry(data22_sf))

cc <- complete.cases(data22_df)
data22_sf_cc <- data22_sf[cc, ]
data22_df_cc <- data22_df[cc, ]

nb <- poly2nb(data22_sf_cc)
A <- nb2mat(nb, style = "B", zero.policy = TRUE)

K <- -A
diag(K) <- rowSums(A)

rid <- as.character(data22_df_cc$GEOID)
rownames(K) <- rid
colnames(K) <- rid

data22_df_cc$GEOID <- factor(rid, levels = rid)

ctrl <- boost_control(mstop = 300, nu = 0.05, trace = TRUE)

fit_gb <- gamboost(
  STROKE ~ 
    bols(SMOKE) +
    bbs(physical_inactive) +
    bbs(air_pollution) +
    bbs(diabetes_prev) +
    bmrf(GEOID, bnd = K),
  data = data22_df_cc,
  family = QuantReg(tau = 0.5),
  control = ctrl
)

```

```         
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
fit_gb <- fit_gb[mstop(cv)]
pred <- predict(fit_gb, newdata = data22_df_cc)

mae <- mean(abs(data22_df_cc$STROKE - pred))
mae
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
g <- ggplot(data1, aes(x = STROKE, y = SMOKE)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "gold") +
        geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, color = "black", linewidth = 1) +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.5, color = "blue") +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.25, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
        geom_quantile(quantiles = 0.75, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
        labs(x = i, y = "cognitive_performance_score", title = i) +
        theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
hist(data2$STROKE)
```
